semanticEvent.description: A man in a suit challenges his opponent to go head-to-head.
An intense opponent responds, suggesting they do this again.
A man looks down thoughtfully, considering the attorney on the other side.
Harvey asks if the attorney of record is Elliot Stemple, showing realization.
Mike confirms the name with a brief, focused look.
A quick reaction shot of Harvey looking intrigued or prepared.
Mike explains how he found out, mentioning he talked to Donna.
Harvey listens intently to the information about Donna's involvement.
Mike finishes his explanation while Harvey looks on, appearing unfazed.
A lingering shot emphasizing the professional dynamic between the two men.
